title: Internationalized Next.js App (i18n)
description: Build a production-ready multi-language Next.js application: locale routing with next-intl, shadcn UI, auth, Prisma, email, error monitoring, and Vercel deployment.

steps.description: Set up Tailwind CSS v4 for styling
Install shadcn/ui for accessible, locale-ready components
Configure next-intl: middleware, locale routing, message JSON files, and useTranslations hook
Set up Prisma with a User model that stores preferred locale
Add Auth.js (NextAuth v5) with locale-aware sign-in pages
Validate locale-specific form inputs with Zod schemas
Send transactional emails rendered in the user's locale
Monitor errors across all locale route segments
CI/CD pipeline that runs type checks and tests for all locales
Deploy with Vercel, setting NEXT_PUBLIC_DEFAULT_LOCALE and all locale env vars
